title: Kielipankissa: Milla Uusitupa
content:
In the Language Bank: Milla Uusitupa

mfederle@helsinki.fi Fri, 15/05/2026 - 14:03
Milla Uusitupa tells us about her research on the clause structures of Finnish and Karelian dialects and on how these structures are used in interaction.

Who are you?

I am a researcher of Finnish and Karelian at the University of Eastern Finland, where I also work as a university lecturer in Finnish. In addition to research, my work involves advising

title: David Schönach will defend his PhD thesis
content:
David Schönach will defend his PhD thesis

mkulmala@helsinki.fi Fri, 15/05/2026 - 09:02

David Schönach will defend his doctoral dissertation entitled "Extending Satellite Radiance Assimilation in High-Latitude Regional Numerical Weather Prediction" on Wednesday, 13 May 2026 at 12:00 in Physicum E204 (Gustaf Hällströmin katu 2)

The Opponent is Professor Martin Weissmann from the University of Vienna. The Custos is Professor Järvinen.

The dissertation is available in electronic form in Helda

content:
Strengthening the knowledge base for EU climate policy

sxsilven@helsinki.fi Wed, 13/05/2026 - 15:17
HIKET framework provides a proof-of-concept for an integrated land-use carbon intelligence architecture.

title: Presentation of #DHH26 Hackathon projects on 29rd May 2026
content:
Presentation of #DHH26 Hackathon projects on 29rd May 2026

jwtuomin@helsinki.fi Wed, 13/05/2026 - 15:06
Helsinki Digital Humanities Hackathon is organized on 20 – 29 May 2026 at the University of Helsinki. The event brings together students and researchers of humanities, social sciences and computer science, for a 1,5 week of co-operation in groups. Public presentation of the projects will take place on 29 May 2026.

title: Arkadiankadun siltaremontti aiheuttaa muutoksia liikennejärjestelyihin Luonnontieteellisen museon lähistöllä
content:
Renewal of Arkadiankatu Bridge will cause changes to traffic arrangements near the Natural History Museum

johanemi@helsinki.fi Wed, 07/01/2026 - 08:40
The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.

The renovation will start with the construction of temporary traffic arrangements from Wednesday 7 January onwards. The renovation is expected to be completed in late 2026.
